t-1.notes: feature: status action signal · StampLastRun @ internal/findings/state.go · persists a store-level last_run timestamp per scan area so status can rank areas by staleness

t-2.notes: feature: tech-debt scan · Scan @ internal/techdebt/scan.go · dependency-free, language-agnostic scanner for TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers + oversized-file/long-line size heuristics

t-3.notes: feature: tech-debt scan · NewRun @ internal/techdebt/run.go · prune-proof run dir + StatePath (.dross/techdebt/state.toml) + report writer, mirroring security's run helpers

t-4.notes: feature: tech-debt scan · Techdebt @ internal/cmd/techdebt.go · dross techdebt enumerates tracked files (git ls-files + tree-walk fallback), scans, writes prune-proof run/report, stamps last_run; artifacts gitignored

t-5.notes: feature: status action signal · securityRun/qualityRun @ internal/cmd/security.go · stamp store-level last_run on each security/quality run so status ranks them as ran

t-6.notes: feature: status action signal · rankAreas/renderActionAreas @ internal/cmd/status.go · ranks idle action areas by staleness (never-run first), renders run-signal text, flips security/quality/tech-debt to runnable with a dead-command guard
